rationale: F46/F51 regression guard — assert .claude/settings.local.json shape so the F23.1 nested-bash bug cannot reappear. Claude-runtime-only per F51. Skeleton not real test; ~60 LOC.
notes: Reads settings JSON directly; does NOT mock Claude Code's closed-source hook-schema interpreter. Asserts the JSON shape (the input to that interpreter) instead. Path resolution from tests/hooks/ goes up 6 levels to repo root.

rationale: F52 missing seam — the production wire that connects the dead-code 6-module promotion subsystem to advisorPromptCache invalidation + telemetry. Skeleton not real handler; ~80 LOC. Corrected for F58 (uses failedWeights, not attemptedWeights, and includes emitTelemetry).
notes: Companion edit to handlers/index.ts: add export { handlePromotionOrchestrate, handle_promotion_orchestrate } from './promotion-orchestrate.js'. Companion test file tests/handlers/promotion-orchestrate.vitest.ts (~60 LOC) deferred to implementation phase. Handler binds invalidateCache internally (not caller-injected) to enforce the rollback-invalidates-cache invariant.

rationale: F37-v2 consolidated 11-row remediation table absorbing iter-3/7/8/9/10/11 sharpenings — orchestrator-ready handoff for the implementation phase.
newContent: See iteration-011.md F59 section for the full table. Net effort: P0/S=2 items (~-27 LOC), P1/S=3 items (~+69 LOC), P1/M=2 items (~+190 LOC), P2/S=2 items (~+10 LOC), P2/M=2 items (~+270 LOC). Critical-path PR sequence: (1) P0 settings + corpus, (2) P1 promotion-subsystem wiring (#4+#5/#6/#7 in same PR), (3) P1 settings-test guard, (4) P1 stale-state messaging, (5) P2 bench coverage.
notes: Per F60, items #6/#7/#8 should be bundled with #4 in the same PR because the gate corrections are pre-conditions on the wire-up landing safely.
